# Platinum Edge Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![banner-logo](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankstagePWS/platinum-edge-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Platinum Edge Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you?[](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/platinum-edge-credit-card#features "Benefits")

## Card Benefits and Features
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 2 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent
  * Redeem reward points for exciting gifts and air miles
  * Get 50% more reward points at premium restaurants
  * Redeem Reward Points as CashBack and use it to pay off outstanding balances.


View More 
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Fuel Benefits
  * Fuel Surcharge waiver up to ₹250 per month
  * Save up to ₹1800 annually, assuming monthly fuel expenses of ₹6,000


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate. (Check the [fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/platinum-edge-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).
  * Get up to 50 days of interest free Credit from the date of purchase.
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


View More 
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## More about the card
  1. ### Card Management and Controls
  2. ### Credit & Safety 
  3. ### More Rewards with PayZapp
  4. ### Fees & Renewal
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions 


#  Card Management and Controls 
  * **Single Interface**


One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Fastag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * **Spends tracking**


Simple interface to track all your spends 
  * **Reward Points**


View and redeem points at the push of a button
![Card Management and Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Credit & Safety 
  * The offer is subject to the submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


![Credit & Safety](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  More Rewards with PayZapp 
  * Link your HDFC Bank Platinum Edge Credit Card on PayZapp -
  * Earn Additional CashBack along with the card Reward Points on Utility Bills, Mobile Recharges & more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on Shopping in-app over 200+ brands
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’


![More Rewards with PayZapp](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Fees & Renewal 
  * On annual spends of ₹50,000 or more, get the renewal fee waived off on your HDFC Bank Platinum Edge Credit Card.
  * An interest at the rate of 3.49% will be charged on any outstanding amount carried forward beyond the bill's due date. 
  * A 2.5% fee with a minimum of ₹500 will be applicable on all cash withdrawals from the card.


![Fees & Renewal](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is the Platinum Edge Credit Card?
The **Platinum Edge Credit Card** is a Credit Card offered by HDFC Bank and is filled with exciting rewards, CashBack offers, and dining benefits that make it perfect for everyday spending.
###  Where can I use the Platinum Edge Credit Card?
You can use your **Platinum Edge Credit Card** at millions of locations in India and around the world, wherever Visa/MasterCard cards are accepted.
###  How to use the Platinum Edge Credit Card?
Simply swipe your **Platinum Edge Credit Card** at any merchant terminal or enter your card details for online purchases. You can also use it for contactless payments.
###  How to apply for a Platinum Edge Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Platinum Edge Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
